arts.ttl: Bournemouth interested in player with confusing contract situation – Things can take ‘unexpected turns’
arts.sum: Bournemouth’s long-term goalkeeping situation is quite uncertain. Kepa is currently on loan from Chelsea and Mark Travers hasn’t shown enough quality to be first-choice at the club. The Cherries could need a new goalkeeper soon and a name has emerged that is of interest to Bournemouth.
